title: Atlas Feedback
description: Sibling to backlog.json. Captures issue reports, bug reports, and enhancement requests tied to specific stories/tasks. Mutated through the /atlas-feedback skill via reviewed PRs labeled `atlas:feedback-change`. v1.8.0+.

id.description: Stable feedback id, format F-<NNN>. Auto-generated by /atlas-feedback.

short_id.description: Display-friendly short id for the Feedback page (e.g. F-001, F-002).

title.description: One-line summary. Shown in the Feedback list row.

body.description: Full feedback text — what happened, expected vs actual, repro steps. Markdown allowed.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the feedback itself (not the underlying story/task).

story_id.description: Story this feedback ties to (when known at creation).

task_id.description: Task this feedback ties to (more specific than story_id when applicable).

author.description: Who reported the feedback. GitHub login or free-text name for external sources.

created_by.description: GitHub login of whoever opened the atlas:feedback-change PR.

response.description: Implementer's response. Set when the dev who claimed the referenced task decides whether to act.

fix_story_id.description: When decision = accept and a fix story was created via /atlas-update add, the new story id.

evolution_log.description: Append-only audit trail of /atlas-feedback operations on this feedback item — mirrors story.evolution_log[]. Captures who flipped status, who responded, why.
